source.model_variant: RLDX-1-FT-LIBERO (Qwen3-VL-8B + MSAT, ~6.9 B params, NF4 backbone + bf16 head)
source.reproduction_planned: Boot the rldx sidecar (tools/rldx_sidecar.py) on a >= 12 GiB GPU and run the reproduction_cli below. Skipped on the bundled 8 GiB GPU at scaffolding time — see skills/rldx1-ft-libero-nf4/README.md for the OOM trace.
source.reproduction_cli: tools/rldx_sidecar.py --model RLWRLD/RLDX-1-FT-LIBERO --port 5555 --quantization nf4 &  OPENRAL_RLDX_PORT=5555 openral benchmark run --suite libero_10 --rskill rldx1-ft-libero-nf4
